And it has carved a path for itself that very few could imagine way back then. And at the center of this inspirational journey is one man who has been with latent view for a very long time. He has been a part of this hustle and he is very fortunately our guest for today's podcast. He is none other than Mr. Rajan Seturaman the CEO of Later View analytics.
